center.name: 陽光海岸 (澳大利亞)
center.summary: 陽光海岸 (澳大利亞)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Marbled frogmouth，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Conondale ranges in Queensland's Sunshine Coast is considered a stronghold for the plumed frogmouth; notable populations are within the Conondale National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Conondale ranges in Queensland's Sunshine Coast is considered a stronghold for the plumed frogmouth; notable populations are within the Conondale National Park
